polis_flow.authority_note: center law names the case without deciding owner-local execution
authority is explicit before council, veto, appeal, or amendment
review path is visible and conflict of interest is bounded
Codex and assistants cannot become voting or recharter authority
memory stores bounded decision history without becoming proof
routing dispatches to owners without authoring meaning
precedent candidate remains derived and cannot force adoption
proof remains bounded and does not replace human judgment

runtime_flow.authority_note: runtime queues the case without resolving constitutional authority
resolver denies sovereign actions to Codex and self-actions to assistants
scheduler checks quorum and recusals before session work
typed helpers commit sealed votes before reveal payloads
vote integrity is checked against the sealed hash
stays are scoped, expiring, replayable, and material
decision replay can expose hash break or lineage drift
KAG indexes only sealed reviewed precedent candidates
stats summarizes movement and does not judge meaning

owner_split.owns: center law, ordered spine, stop-lines, and owner split
source-first dossier intake boundaries and no direct governance write
owner_split.must_not: be written by runtime or Codex

owner_split.owns: bounded authority, stay, vote seal, and replay verdicts
runbooks for sealed sessions, stay enforcement, appeals, and replay
owner_split.must_not: turn scenarios into hidden runtime ledgers

owner_split.owns: derived queue, stay, seal, and replay summaries
bounded decision, stay, and precedent memories
case, appeal, stay, and precedent dispatch hints
role posture, authority claims, release holds, and self-recharter blocks
typed helper calls for queues, sealing, replay, and runtime API
owner_split.must_not: bypass owner consent or authority checks

owner_split.owns: derived precedent candidates and supersession links
owner_split.must_not: force adoption or replace source truth

owner_split.owns: queues, scheduler, storage, stay enforcement, and replay jobs
owner_split.must_not: author center law or ToS meaning
